programme.desc: Hosted by Arisa Cox; 16 new houseguests compete for a grand cash prize; each week the houseguests battle in a series of challenges that give them power or punishment, voting each other out until the fate of the final two is decided by a jury.

programme.title: The Morning Show
programme.desc: Viewers from across the country are welcomed in for an hour of smart conversation, lifestyle segments, big-name guests and live performances.

programme.title: The Morning Show
programme.desc: Viewers from across the country are welcomed in for an hour of smart conversation, lifestyle segments, big-name guests and live performances.

programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Actress Laura Orrico opens up about giving birth at 49 to baby Aviana, conceived using her late husband's frozen sperm 10 years after his death; a man shares how a shocking diagnosis of Auto-Brewery Syndrome finally proved he'd been telling the truth after two DWIs; a 21-year-old man makes medical history after doctors say a groundbreaking gene therapy cured his sickle cell disease.

programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Actress Laura Orrico opens up about giving birth at 49 to baby Aviana, conceived using her late husband's frozen sperm 10 years after his death; a man shares how a shocking diagnosis of Auto-Brewery Syndrome finally proved he'd been telling the truth after two DWIs; a 21-year-old man makes medical history after doctors say a groundbreaking gene therapy cured his sickle cell disease.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: After fate brought them together, a couple fell in love with a vintage bungalow in Los Angeles; now with two kids, the home's choppy layout can't be ignored, so Drew and Jonathan step in to give this family more room to live and grow.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: While throwing a telethon at their college, Barry attempts to woo Ren by promising to get Hall & Oates to perform; Beverly attempts to set Bill up, but things go awry when he finds happiness with a woman he meets through Beverly's enemy.

programme.title: Sheriff Country
programme.desc: A dramatic federal crackdown rocks Edgewater and forces Sheriff Mickey Fox to confront a sprawling investigation that pits loyalty to her community against the reach of the DEA.

programme.title: Sheriff Country
programme.desc: A dramatic federal crackdown rocks Edgewater and forces Sheriff Mickey Fox to confront a sprawling investigation that pits loyalty to her community against the reach of the DEA.

programme.title: Fire Country
programme.desc: When Bode's past resurfaces far from Edgewater, a volatile chain of events leads to a perilous off-duty rescue that forces him to confront guilt, accountability and what it truly means to step up when lives -- and friendships -- are on the line.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Fire Country
programme.desc: When Bode's past resurfaces far from Edgewater, a volatile chain of events leads to a perilous off-duty rescue that forces him to confront guilt, accountability and what it truly means to step up when lives -- and friendships -- are on the line.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Crime Beat
programme.desc: What was meant to be a joyful night celebrating her 32nd birthday turned into tragedy when Mohanie Henry Khan's husband, Peter Khan, was shot. Despite desperately trying to stop the bleeding, she couldn't save him. Now, for the first time, she sits down with reporter Catherine McDonald to share the full story-revealing what happened that fateful night, why Peter wasn't the only victim, and how investigators ultimately tracked down his killer.

programme.title: Crime Beat
programme.desc: What was meant to be a joyful night celebrating her 32nd birthday turned into tragedy when Mohanie Henry Khan's husband, Peter Khan, was shot. Despite desperately trying to stop the bleeding, she couldn't save him. Now, for the first time, she sits down with reporter Catherine McDonald to share the full story-revealing what happened that fateful night, why Peter wasn't the only victim, and how investigators ultimately tracked down his killer.
